name: Hairpin of Blooming Flowers
description:
The flower that adorns this hairpin is a blooming lotus flower that varies in color; it regrows in a day after the item is activated. Whether or not the hairpin's flower is in bloom, as long as you wear it and it's invested, it grants a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy checks.

Activate—Scatter Petals 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You pluck the flower from the hairpin and scatter the petals, creating a flurry of color in a centered on you. You become for 1 minute or until you move from your current location. Any creature within the when you Activate the Item must succeed at a save or become until the end of its next turn (or until the end of its next turn on a critical failure). The flower blooms again the next day.
